ListItem.Para: Inoperative auto-bleed valve is not indicating presence of air.
Inoperative auto-bleed valve is deactivated closed.

Note.Para: Manual bleeding is not required when BLD STATUS shows OFF in HYDRAULIC MAINTENANCE page 1.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the bleed valve closed (AMM DDG 29-31-03).

ListItem.Para: Associated hydraulic system reservoir is verified to be free of trapped air.
Inoperative auto-bleed valve is deactivated closed.

Note.Para: Manual bleeding is required when BLD STATUS shows BLD in HYDRAULIC MAINTENANCE page 1.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify that reservoir is free of trapped air and deactivate inoperative auto-bleed valve closed (AMM DDG 29-31-03).

Note.Para: Any servicing of reservoir will require verification that it is free of air.

ListItem.Para: Manually bleed air from the associated reservoir.
For the left hydraulic system reservoir auto-bleed valve inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HYD AUTO BLEED VLV L and lock with an INOP tag.
For the center hydraulic system reservoir auto-bleed valve inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HYD AUTO BLEED VLV C and lock with an INOP tag.
For the right hydraulic system reservoir auto-bleed valve inoperative, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HYD AUTO BLEED VLV R and lock with an INOP tag.
